FAQs On Home Interior Designs

Choosing the right interior design style depends on your personal preferences, lifestyle needs, and storage functionality. Explore design inspirations from our categories or consult with our senior designers who create 3D renders customized to your space.

Basic interior design for a 1 BHK starts from ₹3.5 Lakhs to ₹5.5 Lakhs, while a 2 BHK ranges between ₹5.5 Lakhs to ₹9.5 Lakhs. A fully customized 3 BHK luxury flat ranges between ₹10 Lakhs to ₹18+ Lakhs.

On average, standard modular furniture manufacturing and installation is completed within 45 working days from final 3D design approval.
Siddhivinayak Designers

Navi Mumbai's trusted residential & commercial interior design studio specializing in bespoke modular kitchens, bedroom wardrobes, living rooms, complete home interiors, and turnkey space execution.
